provinsiCode.description: Indonesian province code using BPS 2-digit numeric codes prefixed with BPS-. 34 provinces. Used for serviceability, tax zone determination, and logistics pricing.

kabupatenCode.description: BPS 4-digit kabupaten/kota code. 514 kabupaten and kota in Indonesia. Used for granular serviceability and tax zone resolution.

kelurahan.description: Village or urban administrative zone (kelurahan/desa). Required for precise last-mile delivery address.

kecamatan.description: District or sub-city (kecamatan). Administrative level between kabupaten and kelurahan.

rt.description: Rukun Tetangga — neighborhood group, typically ~40 households. Critical for last-mile delivery in Indonesia — riders use RT/RW to locate specific houses in dense residential areas.

rw.description: Rukun Warga — association of RTs, typically ~400 people. Used together with RT for precise address resolution.

postalCode.description: Indonesian kodepos (postal code). 5 digits. Distinct from Beckn core area_code which conflates many country-specific codes.

addressType.description: Address classification. Affects delivery SLA and surcharges — offices have restricted delivery hours, apartments require lobby/concierge handling, warehouses accept larger shipments. BOARDING_HOUSE (kost) is common in Indonesian urban delivery.

receiverInstructions.description: Instructions for delivery receiver. Distinct from buyerInstructions — used for gift orders where receiver != buyer, and for handover preferences (leave at door, signature required, call first).
receiverInstructions.example: Tinggalkan di pos satpam apartemen. Jangan ketuk pintu.

gpsAccuracyMeters.description: Accuracy of GPS coordinate in metres. Required for pin-point delivery addresses in unaddressed areas (kampung, peri-urban). Affects agent last-mile routing.

landmark.description: Notable nearby landmark for finding the address. Common in Indonesian urban delivery where street numbering is inconsistent.

blockUnit.description: Block/unit identifier for apartments and complexes. Beckn core 'door' captures house number; this captures block/floor/unit where applicable.
